# Vendored assets

- `chart.umd.js` — [Chart.js](https://www.chartjs.org) v4.4.7 (UMD build), MIT License,
  (c) 2024 Chart.js Contributors. Fetched from
  `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.7/dist/chart.umd.js` and vendored verbatim so
  the dashboard works on offline training hosts (no runtime network fetches).
